intentSynonyms: show me my inline comments in confluence
view my inline comments in confluence
see all my inline comments in confluence
list inline comments on a page in confluence
description: List inline comments on a Confluence page. Inline comments are anchored to specific text in the page body. Filter by resolution status to see open, resolved, or dangling comments.

page_id.description: Page ID to list inline comments for

resolution_status.description: Filter by resolution status (default: all statuses)

limit.description: Maximum number of comments to return (default 25, max 250)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

body_format.description: Body format to return: "storage" (HTML, default) or "atlas_doc_format" (ADF)
